title: Lysosome proteolysis analysis with DQ-BSA
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"98ko2","text":"Protocol to analyze lysosomal proteolysis in astrocytes generated from iPSCs.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Coat a 96 well plate Greiner 96 well Microplates Black with gelatin 0.1% or Geltrex LDEV Free hESC Quality 5 ml Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #A1413302 1:100
DIssociate extracted astrocytes with TrypLE™ Select Enzyme (1X), no phenol red Thermo Fisher Catalog #12563029 for 00:05:00 at 25 °C
Resuspend the pellet in 1 mL of astrocyte media ( https://www.sciencellonline.com/astrocyte-medium.html) .
Count cells and plate 10k cell per well in 100 µL of astrocyte media.
Change the media to mature astrocyte media media in the next day.
On the 3rd day, remove the media incubate with DQ™ Red BSA  - Special Packaging Thermo Fisher Catalog #D12051 diluted in mature astrocyte media for 00:45:00
Add 100 µL of mature astrocyte media with vehicle or with Bafilomycin A1 100 nanomolar (nM)
Proceed to image in the Incucyte® SX5 Live-Cell Analysis System for 21:00:00 using the red channel
creator: gustavo.parfitt Parfitt
